title: Soft Broom Indoor Sweeping Broom Brush with Stainless Steel Handle - The Perfect Indoor Sweeping Kitchen Floor Brush for Your House - The Long Handled Sweeper (Green)
features: Indoor Broom - Soft sweeping brush with a multi section handle. The perfect kitchen house long handled sweeping broom with soft bristle and an angled broom head allowing you to sweep easily without having to bend.
Soft Floor Brush - The broom head has the perfect bristle between soft and stiff making it the ideal indoor broom for wooden floor and other kitchen floor surfaces like laminate and tile.
Long Handle Broom - 4 Sections screw together and go into the angle broom head giving a complete soft bristle push broom for cleaning and sweeping your floor.

Compact Foldable Broom - This soft brush can be unscrewed and neatly compacts down into a very small size if needed (longest section 36cm) but once fully assembled it gives you a long handle which saves bending and helps your back! (assembled length 132cm) This also makes the broom not only suitable as an everyday item for your home but can be used as a camping broom.

Designed To Work - It may be just a brush but a lot of time and effort goes into making sure the item functions as it should and gives a good customer experience. That is why it has things like a hanging eye for storing - grips on the handle for comfy sweeping - flagged bristles to pick up every last bit of dust - rubberised edges as to not mark your skirting boards or furniture - Your perfect indoor broom in an attractive green and white finish.

TDBS Indoor Sweeping Broom - Green Merchant video Keep your floors spotless and dust-free with our premium Indoor Sweeping Broom, designed specifically for effortless indoor cleaning. This versatile soft broom features a soft broom head with gentle yet effective bristles. Multipurpose Indoor Cleaning Sweeping Broom Cleaning in your kitchen and living room has never been so easy. The soft broom with handle is the perfect soft brush for all types of flooring. Previous page Easy to use Sweeping Buddy Designed to pick up dust, hair, crumbs, and fine debris without scattering. Soft Bristles Hard Wearing The ends of the bristles are flagged meaning they are frayed, which allows them to catch dusts etc. For long term use Durable Handle It is durable and include sleeve support for long-term use, ensuring stability and strength. Additional Protection Rubberised Edges Added edge protection cushions any accidental bumps, preventing chips or scratches to walls. Next page 1 Sweeping Buddy 2 Hard Wearing 3 Durable Handle 4 Rubberised Edges Indoor Sweeping Broom Multipurpose Indoor Broom Keep your floors spotless with this Premium Indoor Sweeping Broom designed for effortless, scratch-free cleaning on tiles, laminate, wood, and vinyl floors. Featuring soft synthetic bristles that effectively capture dust, crumbs, and hair without scattering, this broom is built with a durable plastic head and rubberised edges to protect walls, skirting boards, and furniture from accidental bumps. Are the bristles of the TDBS Indoor Sweeping Broom durable? Yes, the bristles are hardwearing and made of soft synthetic material, ensuring long-lasting durability and effective sweeping. What is the broom best used for? The TDBS Indoor Sweeping Broom is best used for overall indoor cleaning, especially on surfaces such as laminate, tiles, wooden, and vinyl floors. Is the broom easy to assemble? Yes, the broom is easy to assemble. It features a twist and lock mechanism that allows you to attach all handle pieces and the broom head together quickly and securely. Is the handle long enough? Yes, the handle is long enough, with a total length of 120cm. You can also adjust the length to suit your preference for comfortable sweeping. Are the handle pieces durable? Yes, the handle pieces are durable and include sleeve support for long-term use, ensuring stability and strength during cleaning.
